title: Fix Giga terminal tab showing wrong output

log.context: Fix Giga terminal tab showing wrong output

Everything checks out. Here's the summary:

**Root cause:** `screen -x` requires a real TTY to attach to an existing session. When ttyd spawns the command as a subprocess, there's no controlling terminal, so `screen` exits immediately with `Must be connected to a terminal`. The browser WebSocket connection would open and close instantly (visible in the logs — connections lasted ~157ms and ~33s), showing nothing useful.

**Fix applied:** Changed the `ExecStart` in `/home/clungus/.config/systemd/u...(truncated)
